headline: T-Mobile US Expands Rogers Alliance As Valuation Lags Analyst Targets
summary: T-Mobile US and Rogers Communications expanded their satellite to mobile partnership to cover out of coverage roaming for app based calls and texts. The move supports cross border connectivity between the United States and Canada for both consumers and business users. T-Mobile US also introduced new travel perks for customers and connectivity programs aimed at small businesses. T-Mobile US, traded as NasdaqGS:TMUS, is adding new services around a core wireless offering that investors...
